title: crepis macedonica
intro: Crepis macedonica, also known as Macedonian hawk's beard, is a perennial plant in the dandelion family with edible flowers and leaves. Traditionally, Crepis macedonica has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and as a diuretic. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving liver function, as well as aiding in weight loss and lowering blood pressure. Crepis macedonica can be consumed as a tea, or its leaves and flowers can be used in salads or as a garnish, and it is also available in capsule or tincture form in some herbal preparations.
